sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value_y DOUBLE, value_x DOUBLE, date_col DATE);
SELECT id, covar_pop(value_y, value_x) + (DATE '2023-01-01' + INTERVAL (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data) DAY) AS adjusted_covariance FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING adjusted_covariance IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, covar_pop(value_y, value_x) AS covariance FROM (SELECT date_col, value_y, value_x FROM test_data WHERE value_x IS NOT NULL) t1 JOIN (SELECT id, date_col + INTERVAL 3 DAY AS new_date FROM test_data) t2 ON t1.date_col = t2.new_date GROUP BY id HAVING covariance > 0;
SELECT AVG(covariance) FROM (SELECT covar_pop(value_y, value_x) AS covariance FROM test_data WHERE value_y IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING covariance IS NOT NULL) sub_query;
SELECT id, value_y + value_x AS sum FROM test_data WHERE value_y IS NOT NULL OR value_x IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sum DESC;
SELECT MIN(covar_pop(value_y, value_x)) OVER (PARTITION BY (CASE WHEN value_y IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS min_cov FROM test_data;
